claim-delay-exposure-15000-per-day.rationale: Both COST-SUMMARY-001 and CTR-DELAY-001 state delay exposure is 15000 USD per calendar day. CTR-DELAY-001 is a contract excerpt dated 2026-01-15; COST-SUMMARY-001 reaffirms it on 2026-06-29.

claim-milestone-slip-13-days.rationale: SCH-DELIVERY-001 explicitly states 'milestone is forecast to slip 13 days without intervention' and cites contractual_milestone_forecast_without_intervention = '2026-08-28' against baseline_date = '2026-08-15', confirming 13 calendar days. COST-SUMMARY-001 independently references 'unmitigated_delay_days': 13.

claim-onsite-assertion.rationale: Progress report PRG-ONSITE-001 asserts EQ-GEN-SKID-01 is onsite and released to installation, but supplier correspondence SUP-NOT-ARRIVED-001, logistics status LOG-STATUS-001, and risk register RISK-001 all confirm the equipment has not arrived. No record supports the onsite claim.

claim-unmitigated-exposure-195000.rationale: COST-SUMMARY-001 states 'unmitigated_exposure_usd': 195000. This equals 13 days × 15000 USD/day, consistent with supported claims for slip duration and daily exposure.

normalized_claims.conflicting_onsite_status_requires_human: Progress report PRG-ONSITE-001 asserts EQ-GEN-SKID-01 is onsite and released to installation, but supplier correspondence SUP-NOT-ARRIVED-001 and logistics record LOG-STATUS-001 confirm it remains in transit and has not arrived — creating an unresolved evidence conflict that blocks recovery authorization.
normalized_claims.escalation_required_for_milestone_integr: Human escalation is required before any schedule compression or resource re-allocation to prevent misalignment between physical progress and contractual milestone tracking.
normalized_claims.recovery_option_approval_blocked: Approved recovery option REC-ACCEL-LOGISTICS cannot be activated without human confirmation of onsite status due to contradictory claims; absence of resolution risks milestone MS-COMMISSIONING-READY slipping 13 days (SCH-DELIVERY-001).

raw_claims.conflicting_onsite_status_requires_human: Progress report PRG-ONSITE-001 asserts EQ-GEN-SKID-01 is onsite and released to installation, but supplier correspondence SUP-NOT-ARRIVED-001 and logistics record LOG-STATUS-001 confirm it remains in transit and has not arrived — creating an unresolved evidence conflict that blocks recovery authorization.
raw_claims.escalation_required_for_milestone_integr: Human escalation is required before any schedule compression or resource re-allocation to prevent misalignment between physical progress and contractual milestone tracking.
raw_claims.recovery_option_approval_blocked: Approved recovery option REC-ACCEL-LOGISTICS cannot be activated without human confirmation of onsite status due to contradictory claims; absence of resolution risks milestone MS-COMMISSIONING-READY slipping 13 days (SCH-DELIVERY-001).
